## Checklist / 提交前确认

- [ ] The change is focused and does not include unrelated edits.
- [ ] Tests or documentation were updated where needed.
- [ ] No credentials, personal data, or private datasets are included.
- [ ] User-facing text is available in both Chinese and English where applicable.
